creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

We need more information before we can possibly help you with 
this. If there is a panic make sure that there is a dump which 
is processed through textdump or something, that is something 
that generates useful input for us. 

Besides that, asking for advice is not something for the PR 
system, although things crashing shouldn't happen ofcourse..
